name: Procter & Gamble — Connect & Develop (outside-in open innovation)
description: The flagship outside-in case from BMG Pattern No. 5. Two BMCs — closed-R&D archetype (pre-2000 P&G) and the Connect & Develop variant (post-2000) — that together show how the BMC's Key Resources, Key Activities, and Key Partners blocks rewrite when a Fortune-50 firm switches from internal-only R&D to a 50% external innovation pipeline.
